ddls:
CREATE TABLE "movies" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each movie */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the movie */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the movie was released */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the movie in minutes */,
  "description" TEXT /* Synopsis of the movie */,
  "image" TEXT /* URL to the movie's image */,
  "trailer_url" TEXT /* URL to the movie's trailer */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the movie */,
  "production_company" TEXT /* Production company of the movie */,
  "budget" TEXT /* Budget of the movie */,
  "revenue" TEXT /* Revenue of the movie */,
  "cast" TEXT /* Main cast of the movie */,
  "crew" TEXT /* Main crew of the movie */,
  "director_id" INTEGER /* ID of the director of the movie */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the movie record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the movie record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movies_director_id FOREIGN KEY ("director_id") REFERENCES directors ("director_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "directors" (
  "director_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each director */,
  "director_name" TEXT /* Full name of the director */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biography of the director */,
  "image" TEXT /* URL to the director's image */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Birth date of the director */,
  "awards" TEXT /* Notable awards won by the director */,
  "filmography" TEXT /* Notable films directed by the director */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("director_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Encrypted password for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., viewer, moderator, admin) */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile picture */,
  "bio" TEXT /* User's bio */,
  "favorite_movies" TEXT /* User's favorite movies */,
  "watchlist" TEXT /* Movies added to the user's watchlist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who wrote the review */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie being reviewed */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (out of 5) */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment left by the user */,
  "spoiler" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the review contains spoilers */,
  "helpful" INTEGER /* Number of users who found the review helpful */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments on the review */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the review was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who gave the rating */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie being rated */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (out of 5) */,
  "rating_type" TEXT /* Type of rating (e.g., IMDB, Rotten Tomatoes) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the rating was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "watch_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each watch history entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who watched the movie */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie that was watched */,
  "watched_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the movie was watched */,
  "watched_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the movie watched */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_watch_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_watch_history_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_genres" (
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id", "genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "review_id" INTEGER /* ID of the review being commented on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who wrote the comment */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment left by the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the comment was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_review_id FOREIGN KEY ("review_id") REFERENCES reviews ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
